import argparse, os, json, numpy as np
p=argparse.ArgumentParser()
p.add_argument('--data_path',required=True)
p.add_argument('--checkpoint',required=True)
p.add_argument('--output',required=True)
args=p.parse_args()

ckpt_dir=os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint) if os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint) else 'checkpoints'
mean=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'mean.npy'))
std=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'std.npy'))
W=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'ridge_last_tv.npy'))  # [C, 96, 720]
ens=np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'ens_weights.npy'))  # [a,b,c] for ridge, sn24, lastpersist
a,b,c=float(ens[0]),float(ens[1]),float(ens[2])

X=np.load(os.path.join(args.data_path,'test_windows.npy')).astype(np.float32)
N=X.shape[0]
Xn=(X-mean)/std
last=Xn[:,-1:,:]
Xc=Xn-last  # [N,96,7]
# Ridge prediction
P_ridge=np.zeros((N,720,7),dtype=np.float64)
for ch in range(7):
    P_ridge[:,:,ch]=Xc[:,:,ch].astype(np.float64)@W[ch]
P_ridge=P_ridge+last  # add back last value (in normalized space)

# Seasonal naive 24h: tile last 24 hours of input across 720 horizon
last24=Xn[:,-24:,:]  # [N,24,7]
reps=720//24+1
P_sn=np.tile(last24,(1,reps,1))[:,:720,:]

# Last persist
P_lp=np.tile(last,(1,720,1))

P=a*P_ridge + b*P_sn + c*P_lp
P=P*std+mean  # denormalize
out={'predictions':P.astype(np.float32).tolist()}
with open(args.output,'w') as f:
    json.dump(out,f)
print('wrote',args.output)
